---
title: "Pesquisa"
lang: pt
---

## Temas de Pesquisa

- **Vulnerabilidade climática e economia da adaptação** — Avaliação de como os riscos climáticos afetam comunidades e quais políticas reduzem a vulnerabilidade
- **Turismo sustentável e integração de políticas** — Uso de PLN e análise textual para avaliar como políticas de turismo abordam a proteção de ecossistemas
- **Sistemas costeiros e marinhos** — Impactos da elevação do nível do mar, quantificação de risco de desastres, vulnerabilidade de infraestrutura costeira
- **Métodos computacionais** — PLN, aprendizado de máquina, sensoriamento remoto, econometria espacial, teoria de valores extremos

## Artigos em Preparação e em Revisão

::: {.pub-entry}
[Sales, V.G.]{.pub-title} (2026). "Divergent Risk Patterns across Coastal Hospitality Sectors in the Northern Adriatic." Submetido a [*Open Research Europe*]{.pub-journal}.
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Sales, V.G. & Fujitani, M.]{.pub-title} (2026). "Do Disasters Speak Louder than Hazard Exposure? Tourism Policy and Ecosystem Protection in Coastal Destinations." Apresentado na [*EGU General Assembly 2026*]{.pub-journal}, Viena. [EGU26-7631](https://doi.org/10.5194/egusphere-egu26-7631)
:::

## Publicações Selecionadas

### 2025

::: {.pub-entry}
[Sales, V.G.]{.pub-title} (2025). "Sea Level Rise: Scientific Evidence, Socio-Economic Realities, and Adaptation Challenges for Coastal Communities." In *Sea Level Rise: Implications for Human Rights, Security, and Peace*, editado por E. Fornalé, 17–60. Cham: Palgrave Macmillan. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-89171-7_2)
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Sales, V.G.]{.pub-title} (2025). "A Coastal Hospitality Sector Database for Vulnerability Assessments in Veneto and Emilia-Romagna, Italy." [*Data in Brief*]{.pub-journal} 58: 111921. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.dib.2025.111921)
:::

### 2023

::: {.pub-entry}
[Sales, V.G.]{.pub-title} (2023). "Assessing the Impact of Governance Policies on Landslide Risk in Brazilian Municipalities." [*International Journal of Disaster Risk Reduction*]{.pub-journal} 99: 104058. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijdrr.2023.104058)
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Sales, V.G. & Strobl, E.]{.pub-title} (2023). "Using Extreme Value Theory to Assess the Mortality Risk of Tornado Outbreaks." [*International Journal of Disaster Risk Science*]{.pub-journal} 14(1): 14–25. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/s13753-023-00474-1)
:::

### 2022

::: {.pub-entry}
[Sales, V.G., Strobl, E. & Elliott, R.J.R.]{.pub-title} (2022). "Cloud Cover and Its Impact on Brazil's Deforestation Satellite Monitoring Program: Evidence from the Cerrado Biome of the Brazilian Legal Amazon." [*Applied Geography*]{.pub-journal} 140: 102651. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apgeog.2022.102651)
:::

## Perfis

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=mL2jpAsAAAAJ)
- [ORCID: 0000-0003-0627-0872](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0627-0872)
- [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Vilane-Sales)
